nodes.label: Create the presets directory if it doesn't exist.
Convert a preset name to a safe filename (lowercase, underscores for spaces).
Return a sorted list of preset names from the presets directory.
Load preset values by name. Returns None if not found.
Save preset values to a file.
Delete a preset by name. Returns True if deleted, False if not found.
Get the name of the last used preset.
Set the name of the last used preset.
Fetch list of all Telegram channels/groups as (display_name, value) tuples.
A compact styled card displaying a metric value and label.
A compact styled card for displaying an insight/tip.
Populate all input fields from a values dictionary.
Fetch and populate the channel dropdown from Telegram.
Get the current channel value (ID or username) from the combo.
Set the channel combo to match a value (ID or username).
Update the preset dropdown with available presets.
Enable/disable preset buttons based on current selection.
Save current values to the selected preset.
Create a new preset with the current values.
Copy selected log lines to clipboard.
Copy all log lines to clipboard.
Show context menu for log view.
Reset all metric cards to default state.
Load tracked positions from bot_state.json into the table.
Clear all tracked positions from bot_state.json after confirmation.
